title: escallonia × langleyensis
intro: Escallonia × langleyensis, also known as Escallonia langleyensis, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Escallonia family, specifically a cross between Escallonia rubra and Escallonia genistifolia. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Escallonia × langleyensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which may contribute to the prevention or treatment of certain diseases, such as cardiovascular disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Escallonia × langleyensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its therapeutic applications.
